text.message: Solo is unnecessary, red is doing well too
Yeah but you’re in first and won’t trade wheat
So need to cut down on wheat on board
You have to unblock it and let it roll
And I offered and you countered for sheep
I don't need sheep...not just going to hand it out
That's not the way to get wheat onto the board....
You aren’t trading it anyway lol
That argument only works if you’re dealing wheat lol
Now red can take road lol
